text: Having issues in downloading firmwares for  Broadcom network adapter, BCM4312 802.11b/g LP-PHY and BWN, so my wireless connection doesn't work. Recently reinstalled all my system trough ISO on a bootable pendrive, so in moment I don't have set any config manually. My version is 14.1 released. Can't fetch it trough git nor porters, even less pkg. New to the system and only know the very very few basics. in case needed, My system is BIOS based, BSD file system, Dell Inspiron 1545.
